production_note: agentic_G2 dual-LLM skeptic: independent of G1 dual-LLM packet-only; solved from quiz_card+slim_packet only; direct agent output; no prior-attempt lives
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content (quiz_card + slim_packet).

exercises.code:
# skeptic S32-T1-A-E1 packet-only
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-1A", **{'schema': {'numeric': ['amount_7d'], 'categorical': ['canal']}, 'row': {'amount_7d': 1.0, 'canal': 'app'}, 'catalog_ok': True}}
meets_contract = record["catalog_ok"] is True
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_UNKNOWN_FEATURE"
print("S32-T1-A", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T1-A-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Theory: «numéricas/categóricas/texto»: Diseña con semántica: ¿disponible en t de decisión? Numéricas (montos, conteos), categóricas (canal, región) y texto (note_len, token_count) viven en un feature catalog . Rechacé predicados invertidos/DEFECTO; código final incluye `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-1A", **{'schema': {'numeric': ['amount_7d'], `. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.

exercises.code:
# skeptic S32-T1-B-E1 packet-only
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-1B", **{'values': [1, None, 3], 'median': 2, 'silent_fill': False}}
meets_contract = record["silent_fill"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_SILENT_FILL"
print("S32-T1-B", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T1-B-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Theory: «missing indicators, escalamiento y encoding»: Missing indicator + fill (mediana/moda) preserva la señal de ausencia. One-hot con unknown y z-score con mu/sd de train evitan silent fill y leakage de e. Rechacé predicados invertidos/DEFECTO; código final incluye `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-1B", **{'values': [1, None, 3], 'median': 2, `. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.

exercises.code:
# skeptic S32-T2-B-E1 packet-only
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-2B", **{'events': [1, 2, 3, 5], 't': 5, 'w': 3, 'includes_t': False}}
meets_contract = record["includes_t"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_FUTURE_TS"
print("S32-T2-B", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T2-B-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Theory: «ventanas y frecuencia»: Ventanas half-open [t−w, t) cuentan eventos sin incluir el instante de decisión t. Incluir ts==t o futuro es leakage temporal clásico. En el workbench sintético de Red Andina . Rechacé predicados invertidos/DEFECTO; código final incluye `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-2B", **{'events': [1, 2, 3, 5], 't': 5, 'w': `. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.

exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T3-A-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Theory: «ColumnTransformer y custom transformers»: Un transformer tiene fit (aprende estado) y transform (aplica). Rechacé predicados invertidos/DEFECTO; código final incluye `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-3A", **{'fitted': True, 'mode': 'app', 'trans`. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.

# skeptic S32-T3-B-E1 packet-only
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-3B", **{'state': {'median': 2}, 'version': 'fs-v1', 'versioned': True}}

status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_UNVERSIONED"
print("S32-T3-B", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T3-B-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.

exercises.code:
# skeptic S32-T4-A-E1 packet-only
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-4A", **{'n_train': 1, 'n_test': 1, 'overlap': 0}}
meets_contract = record["overlap"] > 0
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_ENTITY_OVERLAP"
print("S32-T4-A", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic en S32-T4-A-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card y slim_packet. Theory: «split por entidad/grupo/tiempo»: Split temporal (train ts < cutoff) y group split por entity evitan overlap. Si una entidad aparece en train y test, hay leakage de identidad. En el workbench sintétic. Rechacé predicados invertidos/DEFECTO; código final incluye `record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-032-4A", **{'n_train': 1, 'n_test': 1, 'overlap':`. Sin lives de G1 ni generadores.
